section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor plans to order a lipid panel.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Ordering a lipid panel is a future management action and belongs in the Plan, not in Objective findings which should contain results of tests already performed.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of depression.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history is typically documented in the subjective/history portion; while it informs assessment, as written it is a factual history statement rather than an interpretive diagnostic assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of hypertension.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a past medical history item rather than an explicit current assessment or diagnostic impression.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a past medical history of type 2 diabetes.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is documentation of past medical history, which conventionally belongs in the subjective/history section rather than the assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a past medical history of depression.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This repeats past medical history content and is not framed as an active diagnostic assessment.
